actionItems.title: Keep migration skipped by RUN_PRISMA_MIGRATE guard
actionItems.description: Migration release risk audit exists and safeToRunMigration=false. migrationGuardVariable=RUN_PRISMA_MIGRATE; defaultMigrationBehavior=skip_unless_explicit; safeToRunMigration=false. Migration is not needed for page, copy, report, external publishing, synthetic report, Docker-only, or Nginx-only releases. Do not set RUN_PRISMA_MIGRATE=1 unless the dedicated migration runbook blockers are cleared.
actionItems.verification: Weekly report references the migration release runbook and does not recommend executing migration while safeToRunMigration=false.

actionItems.title: Start real publishing validation after synthetic optimization
actionItems.description: Synthetic failure scenario and optimization implementation exist. Treat both as simulated planning and copy/page implementation only; next step is real publishing validation with observed data. implementedFixes=7; nextRealValidationActions=6; externalPublishingStatus=waiting_real_data; hasRealSignals=false; canBackfill=false.
actionItems.verification: Weekly report references synthetic optimization implementation completed while external publishing remains waiting_real_data.

actionItems.title: 等待真实外部渠道数据
actionItems.description: External publish result input exists, but no real external data has been recorded yet. publishCoverage=0; dataCoverage=0. Do not apply backfill until hasRealSignals=true.
actionItems.verification: check-ebos-external-publish-results reports hasRealSignals=true before backfill apply.

actionItems.title: Confirm real deployment execution with operator checklist
actionItems.description: operator checklist safeToProceed=true; manualRequiredCommands=7. Server/Docker/Nginx commands still require user-server execution or explicit executable environment confirmation.
actionItems.verification: User explicitly confirms entering real production deployment execution, then execution status is updated only from observed command results.

actionItems.title: 开始真实外部渠道发布和数据回填
actionItems.description: Deployment is verified; begin real external channel publishing and validation data intake with observed metrics only.
actionItems.verification: External intake is filled with real observed channel data and validation reports are regenerated.

actionItems.title: Execute production deployment
actionItems.description: readinessStatus=ready_to_deploy; readinessScore=98. Execute real deployment only after explicit user confirmation, then run post-launch smoke tests.
actionItems.verification: Production deployment is explicitly confirmed and run-ebos-post-launch-live-check reports passed routes.

actionItems.title: Execute validation deployment
actionItems.description: launchStatus=ready_to_deploy; run deployment checklist and prepare post-launch smoke checks before claiming deployed status.
actionItems.verification: Launch execution JSON/Markdown and post-launch check report exist; deployed status is used only after explicit confirmation.

actionItems.title: Validate SEO/GEO 自动化内容集群
actionItems.description: SEO/GEO 自动化内容集群 is ranked as validate_this_week. Market and competitor evidence point in the same direction. First revenue is not achieved, so low-cost validation is preferred.
actionItems.verification: Next decision report or weekly report records validation result for this top recommendation.

notes: Approval phrase accepted from scripts/approve-ebos-deployment-execution.ts; status moved to approved_not_executed. Production is not deployed.
Production deployment execution entered executing state after exact second confirmation. Server/Docker/Nginx commands are still manual_required.
Local pre-deployment commands passed. Waiting for manual server deployment result.
Manual server, Docker, and Nginx deployment result recorded as complete. Post-launch check is still required before verified.
Post-launch live check passed; deployment status moved to verified.

Only 确认执行数据库迁移 allows entering migration release mode.

Audit is read-only and does not execute SQL or Prisma commands.
Do not treat deployment confirmation phrases as migration approval.
Backup evidence must be attached before any migration release.

actionItems.title: 选择 1-2 个高 readiness 产品进行首批收入验证
actionItems.description: 选择产品页 readiness 高、价格和交付配置较完整的产品，完成一次真实下单和支付验证。

actionItems.title: 补齐购买后的下载/交付承接
actionItems.description: 对已有价格配置但缺少下载或交付配置的产品补齐文件、在线地址或售后说明。

actionItems.title: 验证产品收入路径：FaceSwap Studio｜本地人像合成研究工具
actionItems.description: 检查产品页 CTA、价格、下载交付、订单、支付、退款记录，并完成真实付费验证。

actionItems.title: 验证产品收入路径：AI Video Studio｜本地视频生成工作台

actionItems.description: Review published products and add price specs or paid download configuration where needed.

actionItems.title: Complete product download configuration
actionItems.description: Review published products and connect download files or online delivery URLs.

actionItems.description: 至少 3 篇内容新增自然内部链接和下一步 CTA。
